subject: [AAI] Add serviceAccount override to local cassandra config
commit_message:
[AAI] Add serviceAccount override to local cassandra config

If localCluster is enabled, the serviceAccount name must match
with the DB name

Issue-ID: OOM-2905

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Ia6860d995dc7f19890855bcf3a8e3e768966a43a
